    <h1 {...{
      "id": "date-trended-advanced-reports"
    }}>{`Date-trended advanced reports`}</h1>
    <p>{`This guide extends the features described in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/analytics-apis/docs/2.0/guides/endpoints/reports/kpi/"
      }}>{`Basic Date-Trended Report`}</a>{` and introduces the following advanced features:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{

          "href": "#add-a-segment-to-a-date-trended-report"
        }}>{`Add a segment to a date-trended report`}</a></li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`All examples in this guide use the Adobe Analytics 2.0 Reports API. The endpoints described in this guide are routed through `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`analytics.adobe.io`}</inlineCode>{`. To use them, you must first create a client with access to the Adobe Developer Console. For more information, see `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/analytics-apis/docs/2.0/guides/"
      }}>{`Getting started with the Analytics API`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Adobe may add optional request and response members (name/value pairs) to existing API objects at any time and without notice or changes in versioning. Adobe recommends that you refer to the API documentation of any third-party tool you integrate with our APIs so that such additions are ignored in processing if not understood. If implemented properly, such additions are non-breaking changes for your implementation. Adobe will not remove parameters or add required parameters without first providing standard notification through release notes.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "include-date-range-comparisons-in-a-date-trended-report"
    }}>{`Include date range comparisons in a date-trended report`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use this endpoint to create a date-trended report that compares metric data across two date ranges. Date range comparisons allow you to evaluate performance for a current period against a previous period in a single report request. For more information on date-trended reports, see the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/analytics-apis/docs/2.0/guides/endpoints/reports/kpi/"
      }}>{`Basic Date-Trended Report`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`POST https://analytics.adobe.io/api/{GLOBAL_COMPANY_ID}/reports`}</inlineCode></p>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`dimension`}</inlineCode>{` object member is not required in report request payloads. For more information, see `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/analytics-apis/docs/2.0/guides/endpoints/reports/#using-dimension-in-report-payload-requests"
      }}>{`Using `}<inlineCode parentName="a">{`dimension`}</inlineCode>{` in report payload requests`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "request-and-response-examples"
    }}>{`Request and Response Examples`}</h3>
    <p>{`Click the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Request`}</strong>{` tab in the following example to see a cURL request for this endpoint. Click the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Response`}</strong>{` tab to see a successful JSON response for the request.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="CURL,JSON" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request"
    }}>{`Request`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-sh"
      }}>{`curl -X 'POST' \\
  "https://analytics.adobe.io/api/{GLOBAL_COMPANY_ID}/reports" \\
  -H "accept: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: {CLIENT_ID}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {ACCESS_TOKEN}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "rsid": "examplersid",
    "globalFilters": [
      {
        "type": "dateRange",
        "dateRange": "YYYY-01-01T00:00:00.000/YYYY-01-31T23:59:59.999"
      },
      {
        "type": "dateRange",
        "dateRange": "YYYY-02-01T00:00:00.000/YYYY-02-28T23:59:59.999"
      }
    ],
    "dimension": "variables/daterangeday",
    "metricContainer": {
      "metrics": [
        {
          "id": "metrics/visits",
          "columnId": "visits-period1"
        },
        {
          "id": "metrics/visits",
          "columnId": "visits-period2",
          "filters": ["1"]
        }
      ],
      "metricFilters": [
        {
          "id": "1",
          "type": "dateRange",
          "dateRange": "YYYY-02-01T00:00:00.000/YYYY-02-28T23:59:59.999"
        }
      ]
    }
  }'
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "response"
    }}>{`Response`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "totalPages": 1,
  "numberOfElements": 2,
  "rows": [
    {
      "itemId": "YYYY0101",
      "value": "Jan 1, YYYY",
      "data": [842, 731]
    },
    {
      "itemId": "YYYY0102",
      "value": "Jan 2, YYYY",
      "data": [915, 803]
    }
  ],
  "columns": {
    "dimension": {
      "id": "variables/daterangeday",
      "type": "time"
    },
    "columnIds": ["visits-period1", "visits-period2"]
  },
  "summaryData": {
    "totals": [1757, 1534]
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request-example-details"
    }}>{`Request example details`}</h4>
    <p>{`The example above creates a date-trended report comparing visits across two monthly periods:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The report runs against the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`examplersid`}</inlineCode>{` report suite.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Two `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`dateRange`}</inlineCode>{` filters are included in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`globalFilters`}</inlineCode>{`. The first defines the primary reporting period. The second defines the comparison period.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`dimension`}</inlineCode>{` is set to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`variables/daterangeday`}</inlineCode>{` to trend the data by day.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`metricContainer`}</inlineCode>{` includes the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`metrics/visits`}</inlineCode>{` metric twice — once for each period — each assigned a unique `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`columnId`}</inlineCode>{` (`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`visits-period1`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`visits-period2`}</inlineCode>{`) to distinguish the columns in the response.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`A `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`metricFilters`}</inlineCode>{` entry scopes the second metric column to the comparison date range using a filter `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`id`}</inlineCode>{` of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"1"`}</inlineCode>{`, which is referenced in the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`filters`}</inlineCode>{` array of the second metric object.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "response-example-details"
    }}>{`Response example details`}</h4>
    <p>{`The example response above returns the following:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Each row in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`rows`}</inlineCode>{` represents one day, identified by an `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`itemId`}</inlineCode>{` and a human-readable `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`value`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`data`}</inlineCode>{` array for each row contains two values: the first corresponds to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`visits-period1`}</inlineCode>{` and the second to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`visits-period2`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`columns`}</inlineCode>{` object identifies the dimension and the two column IDs returned.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`summaryData.totals`}</inlineCode>{` array contains the aggregated totals for each column across all rows in the response.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "add-a-segment-to-a-date-trended-report"
    }}>{`Add a segment to a date-trended report`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use this endpoint to apply a segment to a date-trended report. Segments filter data before metric aggregation occurs, limiting the report to the subset of data that matches the segment definition. For more information on segments, see the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/analytics-apis/docs/2.0/guides/endpoints/segments/"
      }}>{`Segments API`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`POST https://analytics.adobe.io/api/{GLOBAL_COMPANY_ID}/reports`}</inlineCode></p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "request-and-response-examples-1"
    }}>{`Request and Response Examples`}</h3>
    <p>{`Click the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Request`}</strong>{` tab in the following example to see a cURL request for this endpoint. Click the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Response`}</strong>{` tab to see a successful JSON response for the request.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="CURL,JSON" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request-1"
    }}>{`Request`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-sh"
      }}>{`curl -X 'POST' \\
  "https://analytics.adobe.io/api/{GLOBAL_COMPANY_ID}/reports" \\
  -H "accept: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: {CLIENT_ID}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {ACCESS_TOKEN}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "rsid": "examplersid",
    "globalFilters": [
      {
        "type": "dateRange",
        "dateRange": "YYYY-01-01T00:00:00.000/YYYY-01-31T23:59:59.999"
      },
      {
        "type": "segment",
        "segmentId": "s1234567890_example"
      }
    ],
    "dimension": "variables/daterangeday",
    "metricContainer": {
      "metrics": [
        {
          "id": "metrics/visits"
        }
      ]
    }
  }'
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "response-1"
    }}>{`Response`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "totalPages": 1,
  "numberOfElements": 2,
  "rows": [
    {
      "itemId": "YYYY0101",
      "value": "Jan 1, YYYY",
      "data": [284]
    },
    {
      "itemId": "YYYY0102",
      "value": "Jan 2, YYYY",
      "data": [317]
    }
  ],
  "columns": {
    "dimension": {
      "id": "variables/daterangeday",
      "type": "time"
    },
    "columnIds": ["0"]
  },
  "summaryData": {
    "totals": [601]
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request-example-details-1"
    }}>{`Request example details`}</h4>
    <p>{`The example above creates a date-trended report for visits filtered to a specific segment:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The report runs against the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`examplersid`}</inlineCode>{` report suite.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`globalFilters`}</inlineCode>{` array includes two filters: a `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`dateRange`}</inlineCode>{` filter that scopes the report to January, and a `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`segment`}</inlineCode>{` filter that applies the segment `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`s1234567890_example`}</inlineCode>{` as a pre-aggregation filter.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The segment filters data before the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`metrics/visits`}</inlineCode>{` metric is aggregated, so the report reflects only visits that match the segment definition.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`dimension`}</inlineCode>{` is set to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`variables/daterangeday`}</inlineCode>{` to trend results by day.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "response-example-details-1"
    }}>{`Response example details`}</h4>
    <p>{`The example response above returns the following:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Each row in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`rows`}</inlineCode>{` represents one day, with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`data`}</inlineCode>{` containing the visit count for users matching the segment.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The lower `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`data`}</inlineCode>{` values compared to an unsegmented report reflect the pre-aggregation filtering applied by the segment.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`summaryData.totals`}</inlineCode>{` array contains the total visits for the segment across the full date range.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "request-parameters-1"
    }}>{`Request Parameters`}</h3>
    <p>{`The following table describes the segmented date-trended report request parameters not previously described above:`}</p>
    <table>
